of statutes that ban ieceipt of honoraria by public officials'
Section 89502 provides that consideration for an "article
published" is an honorarium:
(a) No elected state officer may accept an
honorarium.
(b) "Honorarium'r means, except as provided in
subdivision (c), any paynent made in consideration
for any speech given, article Dublished. or
attendince at any public or private conference.
